recommendations.title: Final Destination 2
recommendations.overview: When Kimberly has a violent premonition of a highway pileup she blocks the freeway, keeping a few others meant to die, safe...Or are they? The survivors mysteriously start dying and it's up to Kimberly to stop it before she's next.

recommendations.title: The Final Destination
recommendations.overview: A horrifying premonition saves a young man and his friends from death during a racetrack accident but terrible fates await them nonetheless.

recommendations.title: Cellular
recommendations.overview: A young man receives an emergency phone call on his cell phone from an older woman. She claims to have been kidnapped – and the kidnappers have targeted her husband and child next.

recommendations.title: Homeward Bound II: Lost in San Francisco

recommendations.title: Snakes on a Plane

recommendations.title: Blind Fury
recommendations.overview: A blind Vietnam vet, trained as a swordfighter, comes to America and helps to rescue the son of a fellow soldier.

recommendations.title: The Best of Enemies
recommendations.overview: Centers on the unlikely relationship between Ann Atwater, an outspoken civil rights activist, and C.P. Ellis, a local Ku Klux Klan leader who reluctantly co-chaired a community summit, battling over the desegregation of schools in Durham, North Carol

recommendations.title: Goats
recommendations.overview: Having a self-absorbed New Age mother and an estranged father has meant 15-year-old Ellis Whitman has grown up relying on an unconventional guardian: a goat-trekking, marijuana-growing sage called 'Goat Man'. When Ellis decides to leave the alternati

recommendations.title: Becky
recommendations.overview: A teenager's weekend at a lake house with her father takes a turn for the worse when a group of convicts wreaks havoc on their lives.

recommendations.title: Eden Lake
